name: Medium Name

usage.en: One-sentence description of which cells/organisms this medium supports.
usage.zh: 一句话描述此培养基支持的细胞或生物体。

prepSteps.step: Add supplements to base medium bottle aseptically.
Mix gently by inversion. Store at 4°C.

notes.en: Tips, cell-line-specific notes, or alternative formulations.
notes.zh: 提示、细胞系特异性说明或替代配方。

ref: ATCC culture guide or published protocol reference
